title: QuestionBank
description: Curiosity questions generated by the background pass, each linked to the portrait hypothesis it tests, with a sensitivity rating and an appropriateness condition. Questions age out once answered or once the topic loses relevance.

hypothesis_link.description: The portrait facet/hypothesis this question tests.

sensitivity.description: Higher = more delicate (a daughter vs. coffee); gates selection.

appropriateness_condition.description: The topic or mood under which it is fitting to ask.
